bits.name: cfg_tmr_run
bits.comment: Timer run enable, high active.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_reset
bits.comment: Timer PC reset, write 1 auto clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_pr
bits.comment: Prescale register.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_pc
bits.comment: Current counter number.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_mr0
bits.comment: Match point for CPU0.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_mr1
bits.comment: Match point for CPU1.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_mr2
bits.comment: Match point for CPU2.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_delta0
bits.comment: Delta counter for CPU0.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_delta1
bits.comment: Delta counter for CPU1.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_delta2
bits.comment: Delta counter for CPU2.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_rtc_clk_div
bits.comment: Timer rtc clock dividier. Default is 26M/26, 1 bit means 1us for PC.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_rtc_clk_div_update
bits.comment: RTC clock divider update, write auto clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match0_int_mask_enable
bits.comment: Match point0 interrupt mask enable. Write1 to enable.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match1_int_mask_enable
bits.comment: Match point1 interrupt mask enable. Write1 to enable.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match2_int_mask_enable
bits.comment: Match point2 interrupt mask enable. Write1 to enable.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match0_int_mask_clear
bits.comment: Match point0 interrupt mask clear. Write1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match1_int_mask_clear
bits.comment: Match point1 interrupt mask clear. Write1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match2_int_mask_clear
bits.comment: Match point2 interrupt mask clear. Write1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match0_int_raw
bits.comment: Match point0 raw interrupt. Write 1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match1_int_raw
bits.comment: Match point1 raw interrupt. Write 1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match2_int_raw
bits.comment: Match point2 raw interrupt. Write 1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match0_int_status
bits.comment: Match point0 interrupt status. Write 1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match1_int_status
bits.comment: Match point1 interrupt status. Write 1 to clear.

bits.name: cfg_tmr_match2_int_status
bits.comment: Match point2 interrupt status. Write 1 to clear.
